description_long: This is a wooden display or service counter with a two-tiered shelf design, likely intended for use in urban environments such as markets, fairs, or outdoor events. The structure features a broad, flat top surface and a slightly recessed lower shelf, both supported by solid side panels. Two vertical wooden posts extend upward from the rear corners, possibly for signage or additional attachments. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the object a natural, light finish. The back of the unit is fully enclosed, while the front is open, allowing easy access to the shelves. The overall construction appears sturdy and functional, suitable for supporting items or serving as a temporary workstation.
description: A light wood, two-tiered display or service counter with vertical posts and an open front for easy access. The design is sturdy and functional, ideal for urban markets or events.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open access to the two-tiered shelves and the vertical posts extending upward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the solid side panel construction.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fully enclosed back panel and the width of the top surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the side panel and the vertical post.
